<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Eliminar paso de workflow"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/workflows/{workflow_id}/workflow_steps/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



<details>
<summary><strong>Permisos requeridos</strong></summary>

**Dashboard:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `workflows.dashboard.config`
- `workflows.dashboard.manage`

**API Keys:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `workflows.api.config`
- `workflows.api.manage`

</details>



Eliminar paso de workflow

  as={"h2"}
